subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Karím! All praise be unto God that thou hast ever been, and art still, confirmed in the service of His Cause. We testify... Though provisions are available, yet should they insist on sending them, there would be no harm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالکریم لله الحمد در جمیع احوال مؤید بوده و هستی بر خدمت امر نشهد ... اگرچه نبات موجود است ولکن باصرار ایشان اگر بفرستند بأسی نیست
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
